__rationale__: Triggering fixture for WR-01: The chosen polymerase is high-fidelity (Phusion / Q5 / KAPA HiFi / PrimeSTAR) when the PCR product will be cloned; Taq is not used for cloning amplicons.

construct.notes: T-405 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage; Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations.
